remediation_closure_plan.remediation_objective: Configure Let's Encrypt automated solver and bind TLS 1.3 protocol limits in NGINX config
remediation_closure_plan.closure_criteria: Active listener responds exclusively to TLS 1.3 HTTPS handshakes on port 443 with trusted certs

remediation_closure_plan.remediation_objective: Replace OIDC mock validate claims in auth_adapter.py with public Google Cloud JWKS validations
remediation_closure_plan.closure_criteria: API rejects tokens lacking matching cryptographic key signatures or invalid issuer claims

remediation_closure_plan.remediation_objective: Provision Cloud SQL PostgreSQL DB and point AuditLedgerHelper connections to PostgreSQL schemas
remediation_closure_plan.closure_criteria: All write transactions write successfully to PostgreSQL with secure IAM service account bindings

remediation_closure_plan.remediation_objective: Integrate Redis cache for nonce storage and validate dual-operator signatures in MutationGate
remediation_closure_plan.closure_criteria: Replay mutation payloads throw cryptographic exception, rejecting secondary executions

remediation_closure_plan.remediation_objective: Enable GKE Binary Authorization policies in Kubernetes production cluster mappings
remediation_closure_plan.closure_criteria: GKE blocks scheduling of pods utilizing container images without valid Cosign signatures

remediation_closure_plan.remediation_objective: Apply Istio/Envoy authorization policies blocking external ingress traffic on metrics endpoints
remediation_closure_plan.closure_criteria: Metrics endpoint `/metrics` returns 403 Forbidden to external IP addresses, open to internal Prometheus scraper

remediation_closure_plan.remediation_objective: Write automated pg_dump scripts and cron schedules testing database restores weekly
remediation_closure_plan.closure_criteria: Nightly dumps are verified on staging database clones with zero table integrity errors

remediation_closure_plan.remediation_objective: Configure CI/CD pipelines compiling signed release provenance bundles automatically on merge
remediation_closure_plan.closure_criteria: Provenance jsonl generated, signed with cosign key, and pushed to GCS bucket for ATO packages
